about_the_product.title: RMx Series RM850x Fully Modular Power Supply (Revival Series)

items.snippet: a great PSU. It’s reliable and supports my PC perfectly. No coil whine. Fully modular means no extra cables cluttering up the case. Definitely worth the price.
Great modular PSU. With the option to add cables it makes cable management a lot smoother. Plus a good fan to keep temps lower
Solid product, performs as anticipated. Modular aspect makes it incredibly easy to use and change out components or cables. Running with a 5600x and 3070 ti oc
Really enjoy the modular design. My last PSU made so much clutter by not having removable power cords. No issues with install or use.
Very straightforward installation of this PSU. I thought this would get loud since it's a 1000W but not really. I think my air coming out of my vent in the room
The quality of this psu feels and looks amazing. I needed or wanted 12v 16pin power connector for a future new gpu. Only time will tell how this holds up but

It also feels solid and well made.

It runs quiet and has enough power for a strong gaming setup. I like using a good power supply because it is one of the

user_reviews.text:
Performance:Excellent.
Noise:Silent.
Cable Quality:Sleek and unobtrusive.

Ordered on Thursday, received it the next day. The package arrived safely thanks to the excellent packaging. Thank you for the extremely fast delivery.

So far, so good. The RM1000x does its job really well, and it's not noisy at all. It came with a generous quantity of connecting cables, which are really sleek and easy to install. Not much else to say but hoping this unit will last for a very long time as I continue to upgrade my PC.

Performance:5/5 smooth performance. Use it as a psu for my egpu. No problem so far.
Noise:The fan is quiet. Never heard noise. Probably because I use it for egpu and to fully build PC.
Cable Quality:5/5 cable is ok. All fit perfectly to my egpu dock and gpu.

The psu is good and trusted. I recommend it for anyone who wants to build a pc. 1000watt better for future proof if you want to build a pc using gpu like 5080 or 5090. I use RX 9070 XT and it is sufficient.
Btw, the item was received in good condition. No damage to the item and the box. Packing is excellent. Courier also did a good job.

Performance:5/5 smooth performance. Use it as a psu for my egpu. No problem so far.
Noise:The fan is quiet. Never heard noise. Probably because I use it for egpu and to fully build PC.
Cable Quality:5/5 cable is ok. All fit perfectly to my egpu dock and gpu.

The psu is good and trusted. I recommend it for anyone who wants to build a pc. 1000watt better for future proof if you want to build a pc using gpu like 5080 or 5090. I use RX 9070 XT and it is sufficient.
Btw, the item was received in good condition. No damage to the item and the box. Packing is excellent. Courier also did a good job.

Performance:The best in the World
Noise:silent
Cable Quality:amazing great quality & easy to manage, no need custom cable

Safely arrived... Great pakaging... Very beautiful, powerful & stabil PSU in the world .. change from my very old 9 years CX650m to this one. Love it so much...

Corsair RM1000x safely arrived today. Really fast delivery process. Ordered on 23rd, received on 24th. Thumbs up to Corsair and Shoppe Express. Box well packed and bubblewrap. No dent to box. Plastic seal intact. Psu in good condition and cable well braided. Really worth to buy although abit expensive from other brand. Done my research on good psu with long term warranty. I go with this model from Corsair. RM1000x also rated A+ in current PSU Tier list. It also has fan knob which come in handy when manual tuning the fan speed. Not yet tested but gonna build new pc tonight. Will update once done.

Performance:Excellent
Best Feature:Full Modular, ATX 3.1, Type 4 Cables
Product Quality:Excellent

Had an issue with the delivery due to wrong item delivered, Thankfully seller is very responsive and accommodating, even took the responsibility of delivering the correct item to my place and gave freebie.

As per the item, ATX 3.1 Full Modular and Type 4 Cables, fits in my Lian Li O11 Air Mini Case with no problem. Item is working as intended and in excellent condition.

Thank you again seller, well deserved 5 Stars for the initiative of your staff and for the product.

Performance:Probably one of the best 850W PSU in the market (80 plus Platinum but marketed as 80+ gold), will be good long term and future system upgrade
Noise:almost non-existance
Cable Quality:High-quality, modular + extra cables
